data.title: argenx to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Business Update on May 7, 2026
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in Amsterdam, the Netherlands, argenx, a prominent immunology company listed on Euronext & Nasdaq under ARGX, revealed plans for a conference call and audio webcast scheduled for Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 2:30 PM CET (8:30 AM ET). The purpose of this event is to delve into their financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 and share a comprehensive business update.
EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS reported unaudited results for Q1 2026.
Santhera suggests Dr. Srishti Gupta for new addition to Board of Directors, widening expertise.

data.title: AS Ekspress Grupp: Consolidated unaudited interim report for Q1 of 2026
data.description: During the initial quarter of 2026, Ekspress Grupp experienced a 1% decline in revenue compared to the previous year, amounting to EUR 16.8 million. Despite this, EBITDA saw an increase of EUR 0.6 million. Digital revenue maintained the same level as the previous year, making up 86% of the total revenue for the Group.

data.title: IMCD reports EBITA of EUR 130 million in the first three months of 2026
data.description: Today in Rotterdam, the Netherlands, IMCD N.V. revealed its latest financial results for the first quarter of 2026. IMCD, a key player in the distribution and formulation of specialty chemicals and ingredients worldwide, shared its performance numbers for the period.

data.title: Roche to present extensive data showcasing its industry-leading ophthalmology portfolio at ARVO 2026
data.description: Roche, a leading pharmaceutical company listed on the SIX and OTCQX exchanges, has revealed its plans to present significant real-world, product, and pipeline information regarding its ophthalmology portfolio at the upcoming Association for Research in Vision and Ophthalmology (ARVO) Annual Meeting. This event is scheduled to take place from May 3rd to May 7th in Denver, Colorado, USA. The showcased data will underscore Roche's commitment to maintaining vision health through groundbreaking treatments, including Vabysmo® (faricimab), Susvimo® (Port Delivery Platform with ranibizumab), and the experimental interleukin-6 (IL-6) inhibitor, vamikibart. The information to be presented will encompass insights on five retinal conditions, such as geographic atrophy (GA), retinal vein occlusion (RVO), uveitic macular edema (UME), diabetic macular edema (DME), and neovascular age-related macular degeneration (nAMD).

data.title: ING posts 1Q2026 net result of €1,556 million, driven by continued growth in customer balances and fee income
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, ING reported a net result of €1,556 million. The strong performance was fueled by ongoing growth in customer balances and fee income.

data.title: FLUENT Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: Long-term indebtedness has been lowered by making partial prepayments, resulting in a stronger product portfolio and an increase in wholesale growth. This strategic move has significantly reduced the outstanding debt, making the company more financially secure and competitive. This reduction in long-term indebtedness has been made possible by making partial payments and focusing on strengthening the product offerings and expanding wholesale operations. This approach has not only improved the financial health of the company but has also positioned it for future growth and success in the market.
